title: Terraform DynamoDB module
description: Terraform module that creates the yooti-metrics DynamoDB table matching the SAM definition in template.yaml exactly. Single-table design, PAY_PER_REQUEST billing, TTL enabled, GSI-1 on project_id + updated_at.

acceptance_criteria.then: it has PK (HASH) and SK (RANGE) as the key schema matching template.yaml exactly
GSI-1 exists on project_id (HASH) and updated_at (RANGE) with ALL projection
TTL is enabled on the ttl attribute
Project, Environment, and ManagedBy=terraform tags are present

non_functional_requirements.security: Point-in-time recovery enabled. Server-side encryption enabled. No public access.
non_functional_requirements.compliance: Table name must follow naming convention: {project}-{environment}-metrics

definition_of_done: Module creates table with correct key schema matching template.yaml
agent_instructions: Read template.yaml before writing the module — the DynamoDB resource defined there is the source of truth. Mirror it exactly in Terraform. Read .claude/constitutions/terraform.md before writing any .tf files.
